message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) – Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Surveys 2009–2017","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13520","justification":"Core GESIS resource on political behaviour and attitudes in German federal elections; multiple waves in the 2010s allow analysis of vote choice, campaign effects, and political attitudes."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) – Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey 2013","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12010","justification":"Focuses specifically on the 2013 Bundestag election with rich measures of political attitudes, party evaluations, and vote intentions in Germany."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) – Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey 2017","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12992","justification":"Covers the 2017 Bundestag election; suitable for studying political behaviour, populist attitudes, and party competition in the late 2010s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 2010 – German General Social Survey","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13462","justification":"National representative survey with detailed modules on political attitudes, trust in institutions, and political participation around 2010."},{"title":"ALLBUS 2012 – German General Social Survey","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11988","justification":"Provides cross-sectional data on political orientations, democracy satisfaction, and participation in Germany in the early 2010s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 2014 – German General Social Survey","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12253","justification":"Includes items on political interest, left–right self-placement, and attitudes toward government and parties mid-decade."},{"title":"ALLBUS 2016 – German General Social Survey","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12795","justification":"Covers political trust, issue positions, and evaluations of democracy in Germany during the mid/late 2010s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 2018 – German General Social Survey","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13278","justification":"Late-2010s survey with questions on political participation, attitudes to migration and democracy, and party preferences."},{"title":"European Social Survey (ESS) – Germany, Round 6 (2012)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11951","justification":"German sample of ESS with extensive political attitude and behaviour measures, including political engagement and trust, for the early 2010s."},{"title":"European Social Survey (ESS) – Germany, Round 8 (2016)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12628","justification":"German ESS data mid-2010s; includes political participation, institutional trust, and democratic satisfaction, enabling cross-national comparison focused on Germany."}]}
